title: helianthemum × carolipaui
intro: Helianthemum × carolipaui, a hybrid plant species within the rockrose family, is a cross between the Helianthemum × neomexicanum and Helianthemum parviflorum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its chemical composition of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthemum × carolipaui include wound healing, skin conditions, and potential antimicrobial effects against certain bacterial infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, but more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential applications.
